name: White Chili#3
recipeIngredient: 2 whole boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
2 medium green bell peppers, seeded & chopped
2 15.5 oz cans great northern beans, drained & rinsed
2 cans chopped green chiles, drained (4.5 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray nonstick Dutch oven or large skillet with cooking spray.
2. Heat over medium-high heat until hot.
3. Add chicken, onions, bell peppers, and garlic; cook until chicken is no longer pink.
4. Add remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, uncovered, 10-15 minutes or until sauce thickens slightly.
